title: Hadamard Test
description: Hadamard test is used to measure the real part of the expectation value of a quantum state under a unitary operator Re(<psi|U|psi>).

params.help: Psi is the input quantum state vector. It must be a non-zero 1D vector whose length equals the dimension of U and is a power of 2.
params.name: Psi
params.description: Quantum state vector Psi of the Hadamard test
params.info: 请输入非零一维数组，长度必须等于U的维度且为2的幂（如 [1, 2]）

params.help: U is the unitary operator of the Hadamard test. It must be a square real unitary matrix with dimension 2^k, and its dimension must match len(Psi).
params.name: U
params.info: 请输入维度为2的幂的实酉方阵，维度需与Psi长度一致（如 [[1, 0], [0, -1]]）

params.help: Number of shots for the quantum computation. If shots=0, the algorithm will return the exact expectation value without sampling.
params.name: shots
params.info: 请输入非负整数，0表示精确计算
